title: arctotis semipapposa var. scabra
intro: Arctotis semipapposa var. scabra, also known as the Rough Arctotis or Rough Everlasting, is a variety of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Arctotis semipapposa var. scabra include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for medicinal use.
